message:
refactor: extract makeRestFetcher factory to deduplicate API fetch functions (#9771)

fetchAPI, fetchGitOpsAPI, and fetchRbacAPI shared near-identical
logic (token, params, fetch, JSON parse, error handling) differing
only in URL prefix, timeout, and abort signal behavior. Replaced
with a single makeRestFetcher() factory that captures these config
differences. Net -45 lines with zero behavior change.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
